title: Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make recipe featuring lamb skewers with a classic Greek twist. Perfect for a quick dinner or outdoor gathering.

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.notes: preferably leg of lamb or a combination of leg and shoulder

ingredients.name: Garlicky Yogurt Sauce (see below)
ingredients.notes: see notes for yogurt sauce recipe

ingredients.name: Crunchy Feta (see below)
ingredients.notes: see notes for crunchy feta recipe

ingredients.name: Greek seasoning
ingredients.notes: such as oregano, thyme, and rosemary

instructions: Cut the lamb into 1 1/2-inch cubes and thread onto skewers.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, and Greek seasoning.
Brush the skewers with the olive oil mixture, making sure to coat all sides.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers with a dollop of Garlicky Yogurt Sauce and a sprinkle of Crunchy Feta.
